top_10.rationale: Official Python documentation — asyncio module overview. The canonical entry-point for the asyncio library covering async/await syntax, concurrency, and the asyncio ecosystem.
Official Python documentation — Event Loop reference page. Direct coverage of event loop management, policies, and the asyncio.run() entry point; most relevant to the 'event loop' part of the query.
Official Python documentation — 'Developing with asyncio'. Covers debug mode, subprocess API interaction with event loop, and development best practices.
ReadTheDocs 'asyncio developer notes' — dedicated documentation on event loop management with the policy pattern, covering global policy objects and asyncio abstractions.
PyMOTW (Python Module of the Week) — asyncio: Asynchronous I/O, event loop, and concurrency tools. Well-established comprehensive reference for Python stdlib modules.
Real Python 'Python's asyncio: A Hands-On Walkthrough' — high-quality, thorough tutorial covering coroutines, event loops, and efficient I/O-bound task management with interactive quiz.
W3Schools asyncio module reference — concise reference documentation covering event loop, tasks, and I/O primitives for concurrent code.
'Asyncio Event Loops Tutorial' — tutorial focused specifically on the event loop, covering asyncio.get_event_loop() and event loop architecture for asyncio programs.
'The Event Loop & Coroutines - Python Concurrency: Asyncio' — dedicated coverage of event loop architecture, scheduler, and coroutine integration for concurrency on a single thread.
DataCamp 'Python Async Programming: The Complete Guide' — step-by-step guide covering asyncio, concurrency, HTTP requests, and database integration from a reputable learning platform.
